actions.description: Tenth board meeting. Platform stable — 4 consecutive clean QA cycles, zero bugs. Escalated Security P2s (second meeting flagging). R&D directed to start game #6 research. Log rotation nearing threshold. UX/UI pipeline progressing well with CSS tokens research.

nextStep: Next meeting: check game #6 research, Security P2 fix status, log rotation, UX/UI design doc.
